item.description:
Acquired by RF Acquisition Corp II in SPAC merger

A Cayman Islands medicinal chemicals company, is merging with SPAC RF Acquisition Corp II. The F-4/A registration statement has been amended to progress the business combination. The transaction remains subject to shareholder approval and other customary closing conditions.

About: Greenyield Berhad, an investment holding company, develops, manufactures, markets, and distributes agricultural and horticultural solutions. It operates through three segments: Plantation Inputs, Rubber Estate, and Household Goods. item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · HLX
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Hornbeck Offshore in stock merger; 10.27x ratio; combined co to trade as HOS
item.description:
Acquires Hornbeck Offshore in stock merger; 10.27x ratio; combined co to trade as HOS

Will acquire Hornbeck Offshore Services in a stock-for-stock merger. Each Hornbeck share will be exchanged for 10.27167 Helix shares. Helix will convert to a Delaware corporation and change its name to Hornbeck Offshore Services, Inc., with shares trading under new ticker "HOS". Helix shareholders will own approximately 65% of the combined company (45% fully diluted). The transaction requires approval of Helix shareholders at a special meeting; the Helix Board recommends a "FOR" vote.

About: Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, an offshore energy services company, provides specialty services to the offshore energy industry in Brazil, the United States, North Sea, the Asia Pacific, West Africa, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Well Intervention, Robotics, Shallow Water Abandonment, and Production Facilities.

  • Counterparty: Hornbeck Offshore Services, Inc.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-04-22
  • Next catalyst: Special meeting date and shareholder vote

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · LSTA
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Kuva Labs for $4.00/sh + up to $3 CVR; offer extended to July 16
item.description:
Acquired by Kuva Labs for $4.00/sh + up to $3 CVR; offer extended to July 16

Kuva Acquisition Corp., a subsidiary of Kuva Labs Inc., extended its tender offer for all shares of Lisata Therapeutics to July 16, 2026. As of July 10, approximately 55.98% of shares had been tendered. The offer price is $4.00 per share in cash plus a contingent value right of up to $3.00 per share.

About: Lisata Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, engages in the discovery, development, and commercialization of therapies for the treatment of solid tumors and other diseases. Its investigational product is certepetide, which is in Phase 2 clinical studies for the treatment of solid tumors, such as metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, cholangiocarcinoma, appendiceal cancer, and colon cancer and glioblastoma multiforme in combination with range of anti-cancer regimens.…

  • Counterparty: Kuva Labs Inc.
  • Offer price: 4.00
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-10
  • Expected Close: July 16, 2026 or shortly after
  • Next catalyst: Tender offer expiration July 16, 2026

item.title: 📍 Stake · CALC
item.ns0:headline: Receives 13D from Alafi Capital; 17.1% stake
item.description:
Receives 13D from Alafi Capital; 17.1% stake

Alafi Capital Company LLC and Christopher Alafi filed a Schedule 13D disclosing beneficial ownership of 5,242,996 shares (17.1%) of CalciMedica common stock. The filing converts from a prior Schedule 13G, indicating a non-passive stance. No specific activist agenda is stated in the filing.

About: CalciMedica, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops therapeutics for illnesses caused by inflammatory and immunologic processes and direct cellular damage. Its lead product candidate comprises Auxora, an intravenous formulated small molecule calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channel inhibitors for the treatment of acute pancreatitis, asparaginase-induced pancreatic toxicity, and acute kidney injury, as well as severe COVID-19 pneumonia.

  • Counterparty: Alafi Capital Company LLC
  • Stake: 17.1
  • Announced: 2026-07-10

item.description:

. IV amended its business combination agreement with Controlled Thermal Resources Holdings Inc., reducing the merger consideration valuation from $4.5B to $3.15B, cutting earnout shares from 100M to 70M, and extending the outside closing date to April 30, 2027. The amendment also pushes the antitrust filing deadline to September 30, 2026. The transaction remains subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals.

About: Plum Acquisition Corp. IV does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in San Francisco, California.

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · GP
item.ns0:headline: Auditor flags going concern; $5.4M debt converted to equity
item.description:
Auditor flags going concern; $5.4M debt converted to equity

Company's auditor expressed substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern. The company converted $5.4M of related-party debt into Series B preferred shares and common shares, and issued a third tranche of Series A preferred shares for $1.425M. The Series A facility was amended to increase the aggregate stated value by $2M to $20M. Pro-forma equity at June 30, 2026 was $5.33M.

About: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. manufactures and distributes electric commercial vehicles and transit, school, and charter buses in the United States and Canada. The company offers school bus, commercial goods, and commercial passenger line vehicles. It also commercial vehicles for delivery, public transit, schools, vanpools, micro-transit, shuttles, and other sectors. GreenPower Motor Company Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

  • Announced: 2026-07-10
  • Next catalyst: Conversion of Series A preferred shares expected in quarter ending September 30, 2026

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · Pasqal Holding SAS
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Bleichroeder SPAC for $2bn pre-money; $500M+ raised
item.description:
Acquired by Bleichroeder SPAC for $2bn pre-money; $500M+ raised

Pasqal, a French quantum computing scaleup, is being acquired by SPAC Bleichroeder in a merger valuing it at $2bn pre-money. The deal includes up to $290M from Bleichroeder's trust and $250M in convertible bonds from Inflection Point, with total expected cash of ~$650M post-merger. The merger is subject to regulatory approval and expected to close in H2 2026; Pasqal shareholders will retain ~75.7% of the combined company assuming no redemptions.

  • Counterparty: Bleichroeder
  • Deal value: $2bn
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-03
  • Expected Close: H2 2026
  • Next catalyst: Regulatory approval; shareholder vote

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · SOBR
item.ns0:headline: Discontinues operations to preserve cash for Clean World Ventures merger
item.description:
Discontinues operations to preserve cash for Clean World Ventures merger

SOBR Safe's board approved discontinuing all alcohol monitoring hardware/software operations by July 31, 2026, to preserve cash for the proposed business combination with Clean World Ventures. The company will cease manufacturing, terminate software support, and reduce workforce, cutting annual costs by ~$1.2M. Estimated exit costs of ~$50k.

About: SOBR Safe, Inc. a hardware and software company, provides non-invasive technologies to monitor and identify the presence of alcohol in North America. The company offers SOBRcheck and SOBRsure that enables non-invasive alcohol monitoring and detection, biometric identity verification, and qualified, real-time cloud-based informational alerts and reporting; and SOBRsafe, touch-based alcohol awareness tracking products.

  • Counterparty: Clean World Ventures, Inc.
  • Next catalyst: Completion of business combination with Clean World Ventures

Through its 92%-owned India subsidiary, signed a definitive agreement to acquire Riverside International Holdings Ltd, a European MGA specializing in short-term car rental insurance. Total consideration is up to £12 million (~$15 million), with £6 million payable at closing and £6 million in a three-year earn-out tied to performance milestones. item.ns0:headline: Explores strategic alternatives; Paramount/Onfolio LOI to fund debt purchase
item.description:
Explores strategic alternatives; Paramount/Onfolio LOI to fund debt purchase

Faces foreclosure on substantially all assets after secured creditors initiated proceedings. An investment banking advisor was engaged to evaluate strategic alternatives. Related party Paramount Helium LLC signed a binding LOI with Onfolio Holdings (ONFO) to combine, aiming to raise $30M to purchase CYRB's secured debt and remove the foreclosure threat. The Independent Committee is evaluating a potential transaction involving Proton Green. Foreclosure extended to August 4, 2026.

About: Cyber App Solutions Corp. focuses on the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of helium and food grade carbon dioxide. The company’s assets are concentrated in the St. Johns Field located in Apache County, Arizona of the United States. Cyber App Solutions Corp. was founded in 2021 and is based in Houston, Texas.

  • Counterparty: Paramount Helium LLC
  • Announced: 2026-07-08
  • Next catalyst: Foreclosure extension to Aug 4, 2026; shareholder meeting for board confirmations

item.ns0:headline: Acquires 70% of C3 Holding (CLS); $712M bought deal
item.description:
Acquires 70% of C3 Holding (CLS); $712M bought deal

Has irrevocably committed to acquire approximately 70% of C3 Holding, parent of Collecte Localisation Satellites (CLS), via a binding put option. To fund the acquisition, the company is conducting a bought deal offering of 20 million common shares at US$35.60 per share, raising $712 million ($818.8 million if over-allotment is exercised). The offering and acquisition are not conditional on each other; the offering is expected to close on July 14, 2026, while the acquisition closing depends on the sellers' exercise of the put option after French employee consultation procedures.

About: MDA Space Ltd. provides space technology solutions and services in Canada, the United States, Europe, Asia, the Middle East, and internationally. It offers satellite communications solutions, such as space-based broadband Internet, direct-to-device satellite communication, and IoT connectivity; MDA AURORA, a software-defined digital satellite product line; and autonomous robotics systems and services used to operate in space and on the surfaces of the Moon and Mars.

  • Counterparty: C3 Holding (CLS)
  • Stake: 70%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-08
  • Expected Close: Offering: July 14, 2026; acquisition TBD
  • Next catalyst: Put option exercise by sellers after French employee consultation

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Leggett & Platt for 0.1455 SGI shares/LEG share; vote Aug 20
item.description:
Acquires Leggett & Platt for 0.1455 SGI shares/LEG share; vote Aug 20

Somnigroup (SGI) will acquire Leggett & Platt (LEG) via a stock-for-stock merger. LEG shareholders will receive 0.1455 SGI shares per LEG share, implying ~$10.89/LEG share based on SGI's July 7 closing price. The merger requires approval by two-thirds of LEG shareholders at a special meeting on August 20, 2026. Upon close, LEG will become a wholly owned subsidiary of SGI, with former LEG holders owning ~8.6% of the combined company.

About: Somnigroup International Inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, distributes, and retails bedding products in the United States and internationally.   • Counterparty: Leggett & Platt, Incorporated (LEG)
  • Offer price: 0.1455 SGI shares per LEG share
  • Premium: 13.7%
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-04-13
  • Expected Close: after August 20, 2026
  • Next catalyst: Leggett & Platt special meeting on August 20, 2026

The deal was announced in January 2026 and positions General Fusion as the first publicly traded pure-play fusion energy company.

item.description:
Sells 11 A321neo aircraft to Avolon; deliveries Q4 2026–H1 2027

Subsidiary Frontier Airlines entered into an agreement to sell 11 A321neo aircraft to Avolon Leasing Ireland 3 Limited at current market rates. The aircraft are part of the company's existing purchase commitments, with 3 deliveries expected in Q4 2026 and 8 in H1 2027. The sale is part of a fleet-rightsizing initiative to increase productivity.

About: Frontier Group Holdings, Inc., provides low-fare passenger airline services to leisure travelers in the United States and Latin America. The company sells its products through direct distribution channels, such as websites, mobile apps, and contact centers. As of December 31, 2025, it had a fleet of 176 Airbus single-aisle aircraft. Frontier Group Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Denver, Colorado.

  • Counterparty: Avolon Leasing Ireland 3 Limited
  • Consideration: cash

item.ns0:headline: FDA grants accelerated approval for TRUTAKNA in IgA nephropathy
item.description:
FDA grants accelerated approval for TRUTAKNA in IgA nephropathy

Announced FDA accelerated approval of TRUTAKNA (atacicept-vymj) to reduce proteinuria in adults with primary IgA nephropathy at risk for disease progression. The approval is based on Phase 2b ORIGIN trial data showing significant proteinuria reduction. This binary regulatory outcome validates the drug's clinical profile and opens a new treatment option for patients.

About: Vera Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical stage biotechnology company, focuses on the development and commercialization of transformative treatments for patients with immunological diseases. The company offers atacicept, a fully humanized TACI-Fc fusion protein that binds B-cell activating factor (BAFF) and A proliferation-inducing ligand (APRIL), which is self-administered at home as a subcutaneous injection being evaluated for the treatment of immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN) and other autoimmune…

  • Announced: 2026-07-07

item.description:

Crinetics entered a definitive agreement to be acquired by Vertex Pharmaceuticals for $85.00 per share in cash, representing a total equity value of approximately $10.0 billion ($8.8 billion net of estimated cash acquired). The offer price reflects a 101% premium to Crinetics' closing stock price on July 2, 2026. About: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of novel therapeutics for rare endocrine diseases and endocrine-related tumors. The company’s lead product candidate is Paltusotine, an oral selective nonpeptide somatostatin receptor type 2 agonist, which is in a Phase 3 clinical trial for the treatment of acromegaly and carcinoid syndrome associated with neuroendocrine tumors.

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · FRMI
item.ns0:headline: Suspends proxy campaign after judge recusal; 70% votes in favor
item.description:
Suspends proxy campaign after judge recusal; 70% votes in favor

Toby Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., suspends his proxy campaign to call a special meeting after the presiding Texas Business Court judge recused himself an hour before a scheduled hearing, throwing off the timeline. Over 70% of votes cast to date supported the special meeting. Neugebauer reaffirms confidence in Fermi's future and pledges to monitor the board's execution on Project Matador, reserving the right to resume the campaign or pursue director elections at the annual meeting if needed.

About: Fermi Inc. develops next-gen private electric grids that deliver highly redundant power at gigawatt scale to support next-gen intelligence and AI computing. Fermi Inc combines cutting-edge technology with a deep bench of proven world-class multi-disciplinary leaders with a combined 25 gigawatts of experience, to create the world's largest, up to 17 gigawatts next-gen private grid, helping ensure America's energy and AI dominance.

  • Announced: 2026-07-03
  • Next catalyst: Court ruling on board's supermajority bylaw change

Spins off Mobility Global (MBGL); pro forma financials filed

Completed the spin-off of Mobility Global (MBGL) on July 1, 2026, distributing one share of MBGL for each SPGI share held. This 8-K/A amendment provides unaudited pro forma financial statements reflecting the separation and recast segment information. S&P Global now operates four segments: Ratings, Indices, Energy, and Market Intelligence.

About: S&P Global Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides benchmarks, data, analytics, and workflow solutions in the global capital, energy and commodity, and automotive markets. It operates through four segments: S&P Global Market Intelligence, S&P Global Ratings, S&P Global Energy, and S&P Dow Jones Indices. The S&P Global Market Intelligence segment provides multi-asset-class data and analytics integrated with purpose-built workflow solutions.

  • Consideration: empty
  • Next catalyst: 2Q 2026 earnings on July 28

item.description:
FDA terminates PEMGARDA EUA; 12-month transition to June 2027

Received FDA notice of termination of PEMGARDA Emergency Use Authorization, effective June 29, 2027, after a 12-month transition period. The company intends to pursue a Biologics License Application (BLA) for full approval and is in active dialogue with the FDA. PEMGARDA is Invivyd's only authorized product; loss of EUA could be material to its future.

About: Invivyd, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, commercialization, and sale of antibody therapies for the prevention and treatment of viral infectious diseases in the United States. item.description:
Faces proxy contest from Neugebauer; special meeting sought

Toby Neugebauer, Fermi's largest shareholder (146.5M shares), is soliciting agent designations to call a special meeting to challenge the board's 70% supermajority bylaw. The board dropped its lawsuit against Neugebauer after the Texas Business Court ordered discovery. Glass Lewis and Egan-Jones recommend shareholders consent to the special meeting. Neugebauer seeks an independent dual-path process for a transaction or strategic partnership.

About: Fermi Inc. develops next-gen private electric grids that deliver highly redundant power at gigawatt scale to support next-gen intelligence and AI computing. Faces activist campaign from Neugebauer for strategic review, independent committee

Is facing an activist campaign led by largest shareholder Toby Neugebauer, who delivered a town hall presentation on June 30 calling for an independent committee and a banker-led market test of strategic alternatives. Neugebauer criticizes the board for not considering other offers and urges an open process to maximize shareholder value.

About: Fermi Inc. develops next-gen private electric grids that deliver highly redundant power at gigawatt scale to support next-gen intelligence and AI computing. Fermi Inc combines cutting-edge technology with a deep bench of proven world-class multi-disciplinary leaders with a combined 25 gigawatts of experience, to create the world's largest, up to 17 gigawatts next-gen private grid, helping ensure America's energy and AI dominance.

  • Counterparty: Vicksburg Investments / Toby Neugebauer

item.description:

Amended its convertible debenture purchase agreement with YA II PN, Ltd., increasing the aggregate principal to $150M and issuing an additional $38M tranche at 95% of par. The amended debenture bears 7.5% interest, matures July 1, 2027, and converts at 97% of the lowest VWAP over 4 days (floor $1.19). Net proceeds from the additional tranche are ~$34.6M. Separately, the company obtained waivers of debt service coverage ratio defaults at its Cross Trails and CRC subsidiaries, deferring covenant testing to November 30, 2026.

The company plans to submit a compliance plan by July 24, 2026, and is evaluating actions including conversion of RRF LLLP units and related-party debt into equity, capital raising, and strategic alternatives such as a potential reverse merger. There is no immediate delisting; the cure period extends to December 24, 2027.

IHT has paid dividends each year since 1971 currently at 0.2 dollar/year. There are approximately 9 million shares of stock outstanding.
